title: Tracking metrics for IG posts
excerpt:
Hello! 
Is there a way to import the numbers our Instagram posts get into Monday.com? I want to be able to easily chart and visual how well certain posts are doing and it would be helpful to have it be integrated into a …

posts.author: JDreash (Jordan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

Is there a way to import the numbers our Instagram posts get into Monday.com? I want to be able to easily chart and visual how well certain posts are doing and it would be helpful to have it be integrated into a board on Monday. Is this possible?

Thank you!
Jordan

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
@JDreash yes this is possible with the Data Importer app. If you have the instagram post url in the items of your board, you can import performance metrics into the same board in new columns automatically.

I’ve got a specific tutorial here - but feel free to reach out if you have any questions.

posts.author: WildCayot (WildCayot)
posts.cookedHtml: you can pull ig metrics in through a custom api setup and map each field into your boards. I’ve seen folks trigger it on a schedule so new post data updates automatically.

posts.author: WildCayot (WildCayot)
posts.cookedHtml: using social media facial recognition actually helped me figure out if the same profile photo popped up on other platforms. I just uploaded the pic, checked the previews, and it showed a couple of matching accounts tied to the image. The free trial made it easy to test without committing, and it saved me a ton of guessing.
